response.justification: While the candidate is an experienced senior engineer with broad full-stack and some systems-level background (C/C++ at National Instruments, low-latency DLang services, embedded exposure), he lacks the core requirements for this role: there is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency, no Linux kernel investigation or source-modification experience, and no background in L2/L3 networking, switch products, or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X. His recent career trajectory is web/product engineering, not embedded firmware security.
strengths: Solid overall engineering experience (15+ years) with strong testing and craftsmanship practices
Some C/C++ and systems-level work (NI LabWindows/CVI components, low-latency async I/O services)
Linux proficiency and dev-ops/CI infrastructure experience
concerns: No indication of Japanese language ability (native-level proficiency is a hard requirement)
No Linux kernel analysis/modification or embedded networking (L2/L3, switch, MACsec, 802.1X) experience
Recent focus is web/full-stack TypeScript product work, far from embedded firmware security development

key_factors.factor: General seniority and some C/systems background
